title: Agency Information Collection Activities: Announcement of Board Approval Under Delegated Authority and Submission to OMB
abstract: The Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (Board) is adopting a proposal to extend for three years, with revision, the Financial Statements for Holding Companies (FR Y-9 reports; OMB No. 7100-0128).
action: On March 28, 2023, the Board published a notice in the Federal Register (88 FR 18315) requesting public comment for 60 days on the extension, with revision, of the FR Y-9 reports (the March 2023 notice). These proposed revisions to the FR Y-9C were meant to ensure alignment with proposed revisions to the Consolidated Reports of Condition and Income (Call Reports) (FFIEC 031, FFIEC 041, and FFIEC 051) resulting from the 2022 statutorily mandated review of the Call Reports. The proposal also sought public comment on previously made clarifications to FR Y-9C reporting instructions related to reporting certain Federal Home Loan Mortgage Corporation and similar securitizations.
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Federal Register > Notice > 2023-17827
